title: Tregald

'''Tregald''' was a [[Gambling/Legends|game of chance]] played in booths.<ref name="DFRSB" /> The [[Tralla Room]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] aboard the ''[[Coral Vanda]]'' offered tregald to its patrons,<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref> as did the [[Casino Kuari]] on board the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].<ref name="RotM" /> The [[Illuminated Aquean]] on [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]] also included tregald among its numerous games of skill, luck, and chance.<ref name="TVA" />

While trying to track down the [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Dequc]] on [[Qiaxx]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] briefly considered playing tregald as part of her cover while posing as a [[Baron/Legends|baroness]]. She discarded the idea since her [[Force power/Legends|Force abilities]] had diminished in the wake of the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and she could only pick up surface thoughts.<ref name="MJ5">[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 5]]</ref> [[Tomrus]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]], was adept at playing tregald.<ref name="DFRSB" />
